llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 9 (Bond Program Consent Items) was taken up immediately after Oral Communication, before the posted items 5-8 (Closed Session through Roll Call for Regular Session). The actual order deviated significantly from the posted agenda.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Can I please get a motion to approve the item? So moved. Second. All those in favor? Aye.
